title: Christopher Wood warns of AI fatigue. Why Jefferies is turning to India and China
summary: Christopher Wood of Jefferies warns that the AI trade is showing signs of fatigue as investors seek cheaper value opportunities. With India and China positioned to benefit from a rotation away from crowded AI winners, Wood believes picks-and-shovels companies will continue to outperform amid massive AI capex and uncertain monetisation.

title: Expert view: Indian stock market may remain range-bound this year
summary: As foreign portfolio investors sell, domestic institutional investors rally, keeping the Indian stock market stable. Nikhil Chawla, managing partner and co-founder of xMultiplied Capital Advisors, however, warns that domestic support cannot fully replace foreign capital.&nbsp;

title: Bank of Maharashtra Q1 results: Net profit jumps 27% YoY to  ₹2,020 crore
summary: Bank of Maharashtra's net profit rose 27% to  ₹2,020 crore in Q1 FY27, driven by growth in interest income and improved asset quality. Total income increased to  ₹9,063 crore, and the bank's GNPA ratio improved to 1.45%.

title: Top Gainers & Losers on 10 July: Godrej Industries, Indian Bank, Kalyan Jewellers, Paytm, CDSL among top gainers
summary: Domestic equity markets saw gains on July 10, supported by financial stocks and IT giant TCS, despite closing the week with slight losses. Major indices rose over 1%, led by Nifty Realty's 3.40% surge, while IT stocks benefited from TCS's strong earnings.

title: AMFI June data: Equity mutual fund inflows jump 26%, mid-cap, small-cap funds steal the show
summary: Investors demonstrated strong interest in equity mutual funds in June, with net inflows reaching  ₹28,973 crore, up 26% from May. Mid-cap and small-cap funds led inflows, illustrating sustained confidence in India's long-term growth despite market volatility and global challenges.

title: Sensex jumps 800 points, Nifty 50 reclaims 24,200; investors earn  ₹6 lakh crore in a day: What drove the stock market?
summary: The Sensex jumped 828 points, or 1.08%, to end at 77,569.39, while the Nifty 50 settled at 24,206.90, up 244 points, or 1.02%. Investors earned nearly  ₹6 lakh crore in a single session.

title: Muthoot Microfin shares jump 16.5% in biggest one-day gain in over a year after Q1 business update
summary: Muthoot Microfin shares rose 16.5% on July 10, reaching  ₹245 due to strong June quarter results, highlighting a 49% increase in disbursements. The firm reported improved asset quality and diversified its portfolio, aiming to double AUM to  ₹30,000 crore by FY30.

title: Indian Bank share price zooms 10% after announcement of Q1 results 2026
summary: Indian Bank's share price rose 10% to  ₹872.45 after reporting a net profit of  ₹3,273 crore for Q1FY27, a 10% YoY increase. NII grew by 17% to  ₹7,435 crore, while asset quality improved, with GNPA declining nearly 30% YoY.

title: Gillette India reschedules board meeting date to declare dividend. Record date, other details
summary: Gillette India has moved its AGM to 24 August 2026, with dividends payable by 30 September 2026 if approved. The company reported a 21.3% rise in net profit to  ₹192.51 crore for Q1 FY26, alongside a 3.2% revenue increase.

title: Global PE firm Invus nears  ₹500 crore minority stake in restaurant operator Popo Ventures
summary: Invus Group is close to investing  ₹500 crore in Bengaluru-based restaurant operator Popo Ventures, underscoring rising private equity interest in India's fast-growing dining sector.

title: Elon Musk stuns with a U-turn on Anthropic, calls it ‘the leader in AI’ after years of public spat
summary: Elon Musk has reversed his stance on Anthropic, praising its advancements in AI and acknowledging he was wrong about the startup. He now considers Anthropic the leader in AI.&nbsp;

title: Mint Explainer: What is the CCI complaint against Flipkart over its marketplace discounting model?
summary: A new CCI complaint alleges Flipkart runs a ‘recurring subsidy pool’, funnelling tax and operational gains from group entities to just 33 preferred sellers who then undercut independent sellers on price.&nbsp;

title: These value mutual funds delivered the highest returns in 5 years. Should you invest?
summary: Value funds, notably HSBC and ICICI Prudential, have yielded strong returns. Experts suggest that investors adopt a mixed strategy, combining value and growth stocks, to enhance portfolio performance throughout different market cycles.

title: ITR filing: Switched jobs during FY 2025-26? Follow this checklist to avoid errors
summary: Employees who changed jobs during FY 2025-26 should report salary from all employers while filing ITR for AY 2026-27. Verify Form 16, Form 26AS and AIS, report total salary correctly, and avoid tax notices, interest charges and refund delays.&nbsp;

title: Mutual fund delivered 15% CAGR? Why your returns may still be lower
summary: Your mutual fund's published return and your actual return are often not the same. Experts explain why investor behaviour, rather than fund performance, is usually responsible for the gap.

title: Market wrap: Top gainers and losers on Nifty and Sensex today
summary: Sensex climbed 828 points and Nifty gained 244 points, extending their winning streak as TCS earnings, positive global cues and banking optimism lifted sentiment. The rally added nearly Rs 6 lakh crore to BSE market capitalisation, with IT, financials and metals leading gains.

title: Nykaa among 6 midcap stocks that hit 52-week highs, rally up to 30% in a month
summary: Nykaa, Godrej Industries and four other BSE MidCap stocks hit fresh 52-week highs, rallying up to 30% over the past month amid strong market momentum.

title: Zetwerk, Tonbo Imaging secure Sebi nod for IPOs
summary: Zetwerk has an 18-month window to go public, while Tonbo Imaging must list within the next 12 months.

title: Wall Street mixed ahead of SK Hynix debut on Nasdaq
summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.26%, the S&amp;P 500 rose 0.05%, the Nasdaq Composite dropped 0.12%

title: Kusumgar IPO: Issue booked 136 times on Day 03; NII, QIB portions see huge demand, GMP signals 39% premium
summary: Kusumgar Limited's IPO was oversubscribed by 136 times, with strong demand from all investor categories. The offer, comprising 1.55 crore equity shares, aims to enhance brand visibility without proceeds going to the company. Listing is expected on July 15, with a grey market premium of  ₹163.

title: US stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures slip after tech-led rally; SK Hynix debut in focus
summary: US stock futures dipped on 10 July after a prior rally, but are poised for weekly gains amid easing Middle East tensions and falling oil prices. Investors await SK Hynix's ADR debut as chip stocks lead Wall Street's rise ahead of the approaching earnings season.

title: Expert view: Recent correction has provided ample opportunities in large caps, says DSP MF's market strategist
summary: In a recent interview, Sahil Kapoor of DSP Mutual Fund shares insights on leveraging current market corrections to invest in large-cap equities. Kapoor highlights sectoral opportunities like private banks and healthcare. &nbsp;

title: JSW Dulux to repopularise Dulux brand acquired from Akzo Nobel, steel network for growth
summary: JSW Steel is expected to give the group's paint company a huge advantage when it approaches customers who need industrial coatings.

title: Swiggy clarifies FSSAI order on Toing, says it was licence update, not food safety issue
summary: Swiggy announced that the FSSAI issued a prohibition order for its Toing platform due to licence updates, not food safety issues. The order was dated July 6, 2026, but Swiggy resolved the concerns and received a revised licence on July 9, 2026.

title: TCS shifts to outcome-based AI deals, phases savings for clients
summary: India's IT bellwether says it is generating up to 15% AI-led cost savings and passing the productivity gains to clients in phases.&nbsp;

title: Which ITR form should you file? A guide for salaried employees, pensioners and other taxpayers
summary: The ITR forms have been revised for AY 2026-27, affecting ITR-1, ITR-4 and ITR-2. Taxpayers must ensure correct filing by reviewing income sources and changes to avoid complications. The filing deadline is 31 July 2026 for individuals and non-audited entities.

title: Forgot your ITR login password? Here's how to reset it without access to Aadhaar-linked mobile number
summary: Taxpayers can reset their income tax e-filing portal password using various methods if they forget it, even if they don't have access to their Aadhaar-linked mobile number. Step-by-step guide here.

title: AMFI Data: Gold ETF inflows rebound to  ₹3,443 crore in June after May outflows, here's what changed
summary: Gold ETF inflows rebounded sharply to  ₹3,443 crore in June, reversing May's outflows as investors returned after profit booking. Experts say cooling gold prices and persistent global uncertainties revived demand for the safe-haven asset.

title: EPF vs PPF vs NPS: Which retirement scheme is meant for you?
summary: Building a solid retirement corpus is crucial for financial planning. Popular schemes in India include EPF, PPF, and NPS, each differing in eligibility, contributions, and benefits. Details here.

title: Stock picks of the week: 5 stocks with consistent score improvement and upside potential of up to 26%
summary: There are many reasons to expect more volatility in the short term. But if the Gulf region stabilises and US bond yields don’t spike, the quantum of volatility could be less. In the next few weeks, the street will adjust to the decline of both the top and bottom lines of companies in some sectors. Especially those where oil and/or any imported element has a role to play as raw material. In short, a very stock-specific market. Our selected stocks for today depict a strong upward trajectory in their overall average score, which is based on five key pillars: earnings, fundamentals, relative valuation, risk, and price momentum. This implies that there has been a significant improvement in their market outlook in the given time frame.

title: SK Hynix's shares surge 14% in blockbuster US market debut amid AI frenzy
summary: SK Hynix's shares surged 14% in their Nasdaq debut after a $26.5 billion sale, reflecting investor enthusiasm for semiconductor stocks amid an AI boom.&nbsp;

title: SBI Funds raises  ₹1,655 crore in pre-IPO share sale
summary: Azim Premji's PI Opportunities Fund-II, 360 One, Neo Group, Prashant Jain's 3P India Equity Fund and other marquee investors back India's largest IPO this year so far.

title: Recently listed Waterways Leisure Tourism approves 1:10 stock split
summary: Waterways Leisure Tourism announced a 1:10 stock split, pending shareholder approval, aimed at enhancing liquidity and affordability for retail investors. The stock debuted below its issue price but rallied significantly in subsequent sessions.

title: Pulse of the Street: Sensex, Nifty rally on TCS earnings after midweek rout
summary: On Friday, the BSE Sensex jumped 1.08% to close at 77,569.39, while the Nifty 50 gained 1.02% to settle at 24,206.90. The gains built on Thursday’s modest recovery of 0.31% and 0.34%, respectively, after Wednesday’s sharp sell-off.

title: Meta stock surges 7.5% as report says AI chip production could begin this year
summary: Meta Platforms shares rose nearly 7.5% to $677.9 after a report stated the company will manufacture its custom AI chip, code-named Iris, with partners Broadcom and TSMC, aiming to boost computing capacity significantly this year.

title: Swiggy gets FSSAI order on its Toing app licence, rejigs details
summary: The filing comes amid heightened FSSAI scrutiny of food companies and quick commerce platforms over compliance, labelling and food safety practices.

title: EPFO passbook portal restored after software upgrade; members can access accounts again ahead of 8.25% interest credit
summary: The EPFO has restored its passbook portal after a two-week outage due to a database upgrade. Members can access their accounts again ahead of 8.25% interest credit.&nbsp;

title: Same salary, different loan amount? Here's why banks may treat borrowers differently
summary: Lenders consider factors beyond income when approving loans, such as repayment history and financial habits. Two individuals with identical salaries may experience different loan outcomes based on their overall financial profiles.
